summary: The task is complete in substance. The Prisma/SQLite persistence foundation is present, scoped to endpoint/tool schema and deterministic seed defaults, maps to endpoint-tool-management, and does not appear to broaden into UI/runtime/auth work. The provided deterministic check summary shows all mandatory gates passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: `npm run db:prepare` is wired to create `data/`, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and run seed defaults.
Seed preparation is idempotent through upserts and has unit coverage that runs `db:prepare` twice against an isolated SQLite database, confirming singular endpoint, parameter, and response-case rows.

The Prisma schema represents endpoint names, title/description, enabled state, immutable IDs, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic endpoint/case failure config fields.
`docs/generated/db-schema.md` matches the implemented Prisma models, fields, indexes, preparation behavior, and seed defaults.
Mandatory checks in the deterministic summary passed: `npm run db:prepare`, `npm run test:unit`, and `npm run verify`.
